name: redline
description: Local review workspace for HTML documents, for browser and AI-agent collaboration.

scripts.build:binary: bun run build:client && bun build --compile --outfile redline src/server/server.ts
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run test:browser
scripts.test:browser: PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.test-artifacts/playwright/browsers playwright install chromium && bun run build:client -- --no-minify && PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=.test-artifacts/playwright/browsers playwright test
scripts.coverage:all: bun run coverage && REDLINE_BROWSER_COVERAGE=1 bun run test:browser && bun tests/browser/summarize-coverage.ts
